description: Create a retail planogram for the 'Healthy & Family' cereal aisle in Diagrams.net using the template at ~/Diagrams/planogram_template.drawio. The planogram must incorporate product data from ~/Desktop/product_list.csv and follow the merchandising strategy in ~/Desktop/merchandising_strategy.txt. Represent each product facing as a correctly scaled rectangle (10px = 1 inch) labeled with the product name. Position high-margin items at eye level (50-60 inches from bottom), kids' items on the bottom shelf (0-20 inches), and value/bulk items on the top shelf. Identify the product with the lowest margin using a 'Star' shape labeled 'SALE'. Export the completed planogram to ~/Diagrams/planogram_export.pdf.
